sections.title: Welcome to Safety and Environment
sections.description:
This SmartUrbanity questionnaire focuses on perceived safety, security and environmental conditions during your journeys. Your answers help us understand which street and urban factors influence comfort, risk and accessibility. Participation is voluntary and anonymous.

https://www.smarturbanity.com/about

sections.title: Safety Perception
sections.description: Questions about how safe and secure you feel during your typical journey (the trip you most commonly make in your daily life, such as travelling to work, university, school, shopping, or other regular activities). These questions refer both to safety (protection from accidents or physical harm) and security (protection from crime, harassment, or feeling unsafe).

questions.text: How secure (e.g. existence of crime or harassment) do you feel on your typical journey?

options.text: Not at all secure
Slightly secure
Moderately secure
Very secure
Completely secure

questions.text: What factors most reduce your sense of security? (Select up to 3 options)

options.text: Poor lighting (e.g., dark streets, underpasses)
Lack of people around (isolated or deserted areas)
Presence of suspicious or aggressive individuals
Overcrowding or chaotic environments
Poor visibility (e.g., blind corners, obstructed views)
Poor maintenance (e.g., abandoned buildings, graffiti, broken infrastructure)
Lack of surveillance or security measures (e.g., no cameras, no staff)
Previous personal or reported incidents in the area
I don't feel unsecure at all
Other

questions.text: How safe (e.g. accidents, road conditions) do you consider your typical travel environment to be?

options.text: Not safe at all
Slightly safe
Moderately safe
Very safe
Completely safe

questions.text: Which of the following situations on a trip do you consider unsafe? (Select up to 3 options.)

options.text: Heavy or fast-moving traffic
Lack of safe or adequate infrastructure (e.g. sidewalks, crossings, cycle paths, lighting)
Poor road or pathway conditions (e.g. potholes, debris, uneven surfaces)
Poor visibility or limited sightlines
Unsafe behavior from drivers, riders, or pedestrians
Crowding or conflicts with other road users
Absence of emergency services
I don't feel unsafe at all
Other

sections.title: Environmental Factors
sections.description: Questions about how your surroundings affect your travel experience.

questions.text: Thinking about your typical journey, to what extent does noise from traffic bother or annoy you?

options.text: Not at all
Slightly
Moderately
Very
Extremely

questions.text: How does the air quality or pollution levels (eg. exhaust fumes, dust, or unpleasant odors) affect your journey?

options.text: No effect at all
I notice it but it doesn't change my behaviour
It makes me adjust how I travel (e.g. mask, closed windows)
It makes me change my route or travel at a different time
It makes me switch to a different mode of transport entirely

questions.text: If the weather is poor (e.g., rain, wind, cold, extreme heat or humidity), how does it affect your typical journey?

options.text: No effect at all
It makes my journey less comfortable, but I do not change how I travel
It makes me adjust how I travel (e.g., clothing, preparation, or route)
It makes me postpone or avoid some trips when possible
It makes me switch to a different mode of transport

questions.text: How does the cleanliness or maintenance of the paths and facilities (eg, litter, smells, or broken glass) affect your journey?

options.text: No effect on how I travel
I notice it but carry on as usual
It makes the journey unpleasant but I still use the route
It makes me avoid certain stops or sections of the route
It puts me off using this route entirely

questions.text: How much does the visual quality of your surroundings (e.g., architecture, public spaces, or overall atmosphere) influence your travel experience?

options.text: Not at all, I do not pay attention to the visual environment
Slightly, I notice the surroundings, but they rarely affect my experience
Moderately, pleasant or unpleasant surroundings sometimes affect my mood during travel
Strongly, the visual environment significantly affects my travel experience
Very strongly, I sometimes choose routes because they are visually appealing or interesting
